PHASE 1 TESTING
Graduation Framework Checklist
PHASE 2 TESTING
COPYRIGHT PROPERTY OF ZASR DIGITAL LLC & THE BPM METHOD. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.
PROSPECTING &
SCALING
GOAL: Find winning audiences
Checklist:
1. Campaigns created - CBO audience grouping applied where applicable
2. Budgets applied
3. Ad sets created - Pixel event applied for test phase, audiences and excludes in place plus
placements and device targeting as applicable
4. Ads created and applied to each ad set as advised
5. Run testing as instructed
6. Analyse results as advised
7. Graduate audiences that work to Phase 2 testing
8. Launch new ads for testing the failed ad set or decide to stop testing it
GOAL: Find more winning ads
Checklist:
1. Additional 5W Avatar research and analysis to create new ad angles or tweak existing ads
2. Setup your new campaigns using your proven audiences (either via Phase 1 or your own previous
testing if an established account) - use CBO groupings where applicable
3. Budgets applied
4. Ad sets created - same audience, pixel event, placement etc as Phase 1
5. Ads created and added to the ad set
6. Run testing
7. Analyse results and identify winning ads
8. Graduate ads to Prospecting stage (phase 3) - if not required, copy ads into PPE campaign for social
proof building (where applicable - and if budgets allow, this should be completed anyway)
9. If required, launch new ads for testing again in Phase 2 to continue the cycle
GOAL: Find stable performance prior to scaling
Checklist:
1. Setup new campaigns taken from Phase 1 or 2 ready for prospecting (and pre-scaling) -
remembering to consider the campaign grouping as advised
2. Budgets applied
3. Ad sets created together with ads from the testing phase
4. Run prospecting to find at least 3 days of consistent results
5. Pause out extremely bad performing ads if required and restart the next day
6. Scale as required using the right Scaling recipe for you (see the Scaling phase)
note: we move audiences and ads into Phase 3, from Phases 1 and 2. Once our best campaigns are in
Phase 3, we focus on stability, optimisation and scaling these campaigns.
Use this as a high-level checklist and reminder, alongside the Recipes and step-by-step Methods.
Pre-test Checklist
1. Account setup (business manager, pixel, website, billing etc)
2. CORE-4 + 5W Avatar (ad angles - or 'hook's, reasons to and reasons not to convert etc)
3. 4 Funnel System: audience research to identify potential interests, lookalikes and other targeting
options
4. Ad copy, visuals, landers
PRE-TESTING
www.getwsodo.com
